proposal.title: Scroll container CSS missing — need hub tab scroll + overflow rules (1/4)
proposal.description: Fix overflow/clipping in Team Overview by enabling scroll or auto-expansion.
proposal.codeDiffHint: .gv-team-modal-body { overflow-y: auto; max-height: none; min-height: 0; min-width: 0; }

codeDiff.after: .gv-team-modal-body { overflow-y: auto; max-height: none; min-height: 0; min-width: 0; }

safetyRules: Never remove min-width:0 or min-height:0 from modal flex children
Only modify overflow on the targeted selector — do not change global body overflow
Preserve mobile scroll behavior — test 390px viewport after apply
Max 1 CSS file per patch unless issue spans shell + styles
testPlan: Verify no clipping on right or bottom
qaSteps: Verify no clipping on right or bottom
POST /api/product-intel/recompute — issue cleared from fix queue

rollbackPlan.summary: Restore previous overflow rules if regression detected.
steps: Redeploy Netlify (static) and Render (API) if needed
